NEW YORK – Top athletes, musicians and Hollywood stars gathered to recognize the best from the past year in sports on Wednesday, July 15, for ESPN's 2026 ESPYs.
People who have made significant contributions to their sport and community were honored with the Arthur Ashe Award for Courage, the Jimmy V Award for Perseverance, the Pat Tillman Award for Service and the Muhammad Ali Sports Humanitarian Award.
Prior to the ESPYS, the duo of De La Soul told USA TODAY that they could feel the energy in New York this summer, between the Knicks, the World Cup, and the litany of other events taking place in the city.
Garrett's girlfriend, Olympic medalist Chloe Kim, presented him with the award alongside comedian Tiffany Haddish.
Ruskan received the Pat Tillman Award for Service after helping save campers trapped amid catastrophic flooding in Texas at Camp Mystic.
The telecast begins at 8 p.m. and as with any awards show, seat fillers will take the place of guests of honor who aren’t in the venue by the show’s start."},{"url":"https://espnpressroom.com/us/press-releases/2026/06/nominees-announced-for-the-2026-espys-presented-by-capital-one-airing-wednesday-july-15-at-8-p-m-et-on-abc-and-streaming-on-the-espn-app/","title":"Nominees Announced for The 2026 ESPYS Presented by Capital One Airing Wednesday, July 15, at 8 p.m. ET on ABC and Streaming on the ESPN App - ESPN Press Room U.S.","content":"WHAT: — ESPN announced the nominees for The 2026 ESPYS Presented by Capital One, hosted by Marcello Hernández, and fan voting is now open.
Shohei Ohtani is nominated in three categories: “Best Athlete – Men’s Sports,” “Best Single-Game Performance,” and “Best MLB Player.” Ohtani won the “Best MLB Player” last year, which was his fifth straight award in the category, passing Barry Bonds and Albert Pujols (four each) for the most career wins.
Designed to celebrate sports culture both on and off the field, the new additions are “Best Tunnel Fit,” “Best Celebration,” and “Best Sports Card.” The full slate of nominees and voting details for these categories will be announced in the coming weeks.

Koch Theater at Lincoln Center in New York.
Los Angeles Rams edge rusher Myles Garrett, Cleveland Browns quarterback Shedeur Sanders and Las Vegas Raiders quarterback Fernando Mendoza will be in attendance before turning their full attention to training camp in the upcoming weeks.
The show will air on ABC and be streamed on ESPN+.

The ESPYS return to New York City on July 15. The hottest summer event in sports -- outside of the FIFA World Cup -- returns to New York City this month with the 2026 ESPYS. Here's everything fans and viewers need to know ahead of the 2026 ESPYS. ## When are the ESPYS? ## Who is hosting the 2026 ESPYS? This year marks the ESPYS return to New York City, where the event will air live from the David H. ## Who is nominated at this year's ESPYS? Brunson, the NBA Finals MVP who led the New York Knicks to their first championship title since 1973, is nominated in three categories: best athlete - men's sports, best championship performance and best NBA player. Last year's ESPYs were hosted by Shane Gillis at the Dolby Theater in Hollywood, but this year the show returns back to the East Coast -- in New York City for the ninth time -- and will be hosted by comedian and \"Saturday Night Live\" star Marcello Hernandez.
